response.justification: Strong fullstack engineer with 6+ years progressive seniority and exact match on primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, directly matching the rare requirement. Demonstrates solid engineering fundamentals, architecture contributions, and software craftsmanship ethos through TDD advocacy and testing expertise. Minor gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest, Jest not explicitly mentioned) rather than foundational, easily addressable at mid-senior level.
strengths: Demonstrates 6+ years fullstack proficiency with exact primary stack match (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior roles, including recent work at Optilyz (2021–2025)
Currently leading AI-agent infrastructure development including MCP frameworks at re:cinq—directly addressing the rare required skill; also shows up-to-date platform knowledge
Strong software craftsmanship philosophy: TDD advocate, extensive testing/quality background, microservices expertise, and proven architecture contributions across enterprise systems
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite deep Node.js backend experience; would require framework-specific onboarding despite strong fundamentals
Jest, Vitest, and Playwright testing frameworks not listed; though TDD mindset and testing philosophy are evident, specific tools would need learning
Resume shows overlapping dates (2012–2014) and missing explicit mentions of PostgreSQL, Kotlin, and GCP/Azure—potential coverage gaps alongside MongoDB and AWS focus
